svg.title: Synalux POS — loyalty
svg.desc: Synalux POS mockup screen for loyalty. All UI elements admin-configurable.
svg.text: Points rules -- Tier thresholds -- Referral bonuses -- Enrollment channels
Phone# lookup at checkout -- prompt: "Earn points? Enter phone"
Auto-earn on payment -- points credited to pos_loyalty_events in real-time
Tier auto-upgrade -- evaluated on every points credit event
Birthday auto-bonus -- triggered by CRON matching pos_customers.birthday
Synalux POS -- Loyalty Program -- pos_customers + pos_loyalty_events + pos_loyalty_tiers + pos_loyalty_rewards + pos_referral_bonuses + pos_loyalty_config
Phone lookup -- Bronze/Silver/Gold tiers -- Referral bonuses -- Auto-enrollment -- Admin-configurable
